name: Dr. Hélene Dubois
bio: Professor of Kinesiology and Biomechanics at the University of Geneva. Author of 50+ papers on human locomotion and drag.
tone: Formal, academic, passive-voice oriented, dense with literature references, highly structured.
structure: Abstract, Literature Review, Methodology, Discussion, and formatted Bibliography.

formatting.equationUsage: Complex drag and biomechanical mechanical formulas.
formatting.tableUsage: Table comparing results of existing literature with current study.
